description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of JavaScript's native Date class, testing practical API usage and common pitfalls with a light‑hearted, encouraging tone. It is positioned as an easy‑to‑medium difficulty multiple‑choice challenge that reinforces understanding without requiring registration.
Topics: JavaScript Date object, Date parsing and formatting, Time zones and localization, Common Date API methods, Avoiding unnecessary third‑party libraries
Audience: Front‑end developers, JavaScript learners, and anyone looking to validate or improve their native Date handling skills.
